posts.author: Rahul_Behera
posts.community: Rajesh Exports: Time to examine this story seriously?
posts.text: CNBCTV18 – 26 Jun 26 Rajesh Exports says ED search ends with no discrepancies in inventory or cash... Rajesh Exports said the Enforcement Directorate concluded a search at the company's premises on June 25, with no discrepancies found in inventory or cash and no valuable items seized.

posts.author: Rahul_Behera
posts.community: Rajesh Exports: Time to examine this story seriously?
posts.text: Absolutely all over and kept repeating same over and over. There were some things he said was so weird like owning 100% stake in a company and not getting any accounting details from them Getting barred from stock market and not being bothered by that said he doesn’t care When asked a simple question won’t give a simple answer instead played a game of musical chairs with his explanations Also kept on asking the other memebers about if they think of it as a scam Seemed to be like an image cleaning campaign if something goes wrong.

posts.author: imurlovish
posts.community: Rajesh Exports: Time to examine this story seriously?
posts.text: Looks like he is all over the place on YT world.

posts.author: Bala_Sundaresan
posts.community: Rajesh Exports: Time to examine this story seriously?
posts.text: Yes. Sebi should also put in place mechanisms to flag such companies early. As you point out there have been skipped filings, the financials have red flags since FY23 etc.

posts.author: Shail1234
posts.community: Rajesh Exports: Time to examine this story seriously?
posts.text: If anybody has attended their Annual general meeting, they would have known. It was few minute speech, just took one question from participant and end it. I tried to ask question but not taken up. They were thinking they are above law by missing financial reporting multiple times, misreporting, still Dec 25 SHP is pending. All DII exit except LIC. Motilal oswal also had around 4 lakh share which they sold. There is clear misrepresentation of accounts. Hope SEBI stays firm and dont underplay.

posts.author: Bala_Sundaresan
posts.community: Rajesh Exports: Time to examine this story seriously?
posts.text: Fair point. And the only avenue left is annual reports, presentations and MCA filings. But there a lot of companies that do not file their concall transcripts. I think this happens because they do not hold an “investor/analyst conference call” at all but rather have one-to-one meetings or roadshows with investors. For eg. TRENT also has no Concalls transcripts, while there are multiple investor meetings Investor/Analyst Meets – Trent Limited . In each case the attached PDF says, “Kindly note that no unpublished price sensitive information would be shared during the meetings.” The case of Rajes…
